domain: Hutsul Carpathian pysanka wax-resist Easter egg (Ukrainian writanka; kistka beeswax tool; multi-fold geometric quadrant symmetry; eggs first sectioned then filled; cosmological preservation tied to egg-writing continuity)
specific_mechanism: Multi-fold rotational symmetry constraint on selected attention Q/K weight blocks W_h ∈ R^{2d×2d}: enforce R^k · W_h · R^{-k} = W_h for k=1,2,3 where R is a 90° block-diagonal rotation in d/2 coordinate planes. Symmetry-violation residual ε_h = sum_k ||W_h - R^k W_h R^{-k}||_F is a per-block diagnostic; blocks with ε_h > τ flagged as TOPOLOGICAL DEFECTS correlating with hallucination/spurious-feature emergence.
llm_application: PYSANKA-QUAD: a 4-fold rotational-symmetry regularizer + defect-detector for attention Q/K weight blocks. Construction: (1) partition Q/K weights into block-pairs W_h ∈ R^{2d×2d}; (2) define 90° rotation R = [[0,-I],[I,0]] in selected coordinate planes; (3) training loss adds penalty L_sym = β·sum_h sum_{k=1,2,3} ||W_h - R^k W_h R^{-k}||_F^2 to encourage 4-fold rotational symmetry on selected blocks; (4) inference-time ε_h = same expression with β=0 functions as DEFECT DETECTOR — blocks with ε_h > τ flagged as 'cracked' symmetry sites correlating with hallucination/adversarial-vulnerability. Differs from EquiLLM 2502.11149 (E(3) equivariance via geometry-aware adapter, not in-attention block constraint), JMLR 2025 Nuclear-Norm Symmetry (Hamiltonian-structure promotion via nuclear norm, not 4-fold rotation), Recurrent Equivariant Modulation 2602.02853 (per-layer learnable relaxation), Constraint Relaxation 2408.13242 (progressively-relaxed equivariance). Differs from R425 NDEBELE-TRIANGLE (triangular-mesh equilateral-edge regularizer + vertex-degree defect) by 4-FOLD ROTATIONAL symmetry-violation defect; from R423 KULA-PARITY (paired-flow attention parity).
novelty_claim: EquiLLM + JMLR Symmetry + Recurrent Equivariant + Equivariant Constraint Relaxation cover equivariance-constraint design. PYSANKA-QUAD adds (a) 4-fold-rotational specific symmetry block + (b) symmetry-violation defect-detector for hallucination correlation. Recombination.
